hero.title: Renato dos Santos
hero.subtitle: Quality Assurance Analyst - Automation & Software Quality

about.title: ABOUT
about.paragraph1: Hi! My name is Renato, a Software Quality Assurance (QA) Analyst with over 2 years of experience in the technology field. I work with manual and automated testing, scenario documentation, and bug report creation, contributing to the delivery of more reliable and stable digital products. I have experience with test automation using Playwright and Cypress.
about.paragraph2: I also have knowledge in Web Development, which gives me a broad view of the software development cycle and facilitates collaboration between the product, development, and quality areas.
about.paragraph3: Currently, I am deepening my knowledge in test automation, CI/CD, REST APIs (Performance testing), and DevOps culture, seeking to continuously evolve as a Software Quality professional.
